## Sources

- Do512
- Do512 Family
- Official venue, event, or concert sites

## Functional Requirements

- Browse and filter local events
- Family-friendly indicators
- One-tap add to Google Calendar

## Acceptance Criteria

- Events can be discovered and previewed
- Events can be added to calendar with one action
- Source attribution is visible

## Jenya Impact

Helps answer “What should we do this weekend?” without research fatigue.
